items.message: No documentation gaps found: The triggering push (commit 2b723c49d, PR #58530) is an automated SDK regeneration updating the azure-typespec/http-client-csharp generator to version 1.0.0-alpha.20260422.3. This is a mechanical generator version bump with no new user-visible service APIs or features. The unreleased CHANGELOG sections are empty, and existing package documentation (e.g., Azure.AI.Projects README covering RedTeams, Evaluations, etc.) is already comprehensive. No documentation issue is warranted.
